text: Sir, mujhe 15/03/2024 ko ek call aaya tha unknown number 9187234560 se. Caller ne bola ki aapka SBI account ka KYC expire ho gaya hai aur aapko abhi update karna padega otherwise account block ho jayega. Unhone mujhe ek link bheja WhatsApp pe — https://sbi-secure-kyc.in/update aur bola isme login karo apna details dalke. Maine dar ke maare login kar diya aur OTP bhi de diya jo mere phone pe aaya tha. Uske baad 15 minutes ke andar mere account se ₹25,000 transfer ho gaya UPI se. Transaction ka UTR number hai UTIB24031578934. Phir 10 minute baad ek aur transaction hua ₹18,500 ka. Total Rs.43,500 chale gaye mere savings account 29384756102 se. Maine turant bank ko call kiya aur complaint kiya. Ye sab 15 March 2024 ko hua between 2pm to 4pm. Dusra phone number jisse unhone call kiya tha woh hai 8734210965. Paisa gaya yk.sharma42@okaxis pe. Mujhe lagta hai ye ek organized gang hai jo senior citizens ko target kar rahi hai.

Main ek housewife hoon aur 22/01/2024 ko mujhe WhatsApp pe ek message aaya number 7865432109 se. Unhone bola ki ghar baithe part time job hai — Amazon products ko review karo aur daily ₹5,000 kamao. Pehle unhone mujhe ek chhota task diya aur Rs.500 mere account mein daal diye as proof. Phir bola ki ab aapko investment karna padega — pehle ₹3,000 bhejo, phir ₹10,000 bhejo, returns double milega. Maine total ₹45,000 bhej diya different UPI IDs pe — taskmanager.india@paytm aur earn.daily2024@ybl. Jab maine withdrawal request kiya toh unhone bola aur ₹25,000 bhejo tax ke liye. Tab mujhe samajh aaya ki ye fraud hai. Reference number tha REF HDFC20240122789456 first transaction ka. Ye sab 22 January 2024 se 28 January 2024 ke beech hua. Unke website ka link tha https://amazon-task-earning.com/register aur telegram pe bhi group tha. Dusra number jisse contact kiya woh hai 9012345678. Total loss Rs.45,000 hai mera.

Date: 08/02/2024. Mujhe ek call aaya +91-8456723190 number se. Caller ne bola ki FedEx courier hai aur aapke naam se ek suspicious parcel aaya hai Mumbai customs mein jisme drugs hai aur aapke khilaf case register hoga. Unhone bola agar aap cooperate karo toh hum help karenge — phir call transfer kiya ek fake CBI officer ko number 7234561890 pe. Us officer ne mujhe dhamkaya ki aapka Aadhaar compromised hai aur money laundering ka case hai. Unhone bola ki verification ke liye aapko apne account se paisa transfer karna padega safe RBI account mein — jo obviously fake tha. Maine darke maare ₹1,50,000 transfer kar diya 08 February 2024 ko — UTR number SBIN24020812345678. Phir 10/02/2024 ko aur bola ₹75,000 bhejo final verification ke liye — maine woh bhi bhej diya, transaction id TXN240210ABCD9876. Total ₹2,25,000 ka fraud hua mere saath. Payment gaya tha rbi.verification2024@oksbi pe aur ek bank account number 43210987654321 pe bhi. Website dikhaya tha https://fedex-india-tracking.co/verify jisme mera parcel ka fake status tha.

Complaint date: 5 April 2024. Mere phone pe 02/04/2024 ko ek SMS aaya — 'Dear customer, your bank account will be suspended. Update KYC immediately: https://axis-bank-kyc-update.net/verify'. Maine us link pe click kar diya aur apna mobile number 9876543210 aur debit card details daal diye. Uske 30 min baad mere account se ₹12,000 debit ho gaye. Transaction reference: AXIS2404025678901234. Phir ussi raat ko 3 April 2024 ko ek aur unauthorized transaction hua ₹8,500 ka from my account 12345678901234. Maine turant Axis Bank customer care ko call kiya aur card block karwaya. Fraud wala number tha 8901234567 jisse SMS aaya tha aur ek aur number 7654321098 se bhi missed calls aa rahe the. Total loss: Rs.20,500. Paisa gaya scammer.axis@icici pe. Maine cyber cell mein bhi complaint file ki hai.

Mera naam Anand hai aur main ek retired teacher hoon. 10/12/2023 ko mere bete ke friend ne bataya ek trading app ke baare mein — StockPro AI. Unka website tha https://stockpro-ai-trading.com aur unhone Telegram group join karwaya. Pehle chhote investments se acche returns dikhaye — ₹5,000 lagao, ₹8,000 wapas milo. Maine trust karke December 2023 se March 2024 tak total ₹3,50,000 invest kar diya. Payments maine UPI se bheje — stockpro.invest@ybl aur ek bank account pe direct transfer bhi kiya account number 98765432101234. Jab 15/03/2024 ko maine withdrawal request kiya toh bola minimum ₹1,00,000 aur invest karo tabhi withdrawal hoga. Maine mana kiya toh app band ho gaya aur website bhi down ho gayi. Contact numbers the — 9345678120 aur 8567891234. Last transaction ka UTR hai UBIN2403157890123456 dated 12 March 2024 ka. Mere paas sab screenshots hain WhatsApp chat ke. Ye clearly ek Ponzi scheme hai jo small investors ko target kar rahi hai. 18/03/2024 ko maine local police mein FIR darj karwa di. Total loss approximately ₹3,50,000 — meri poori retirement savings.
